name: WP-4 — Deletion + Export: wire deletion.ts + export.ts to v2
description: Wire deletion.ts (8 sites: accounts/profiles) and export.ts (5 sites: all 5 tables) onto v2 twins. Ownership/scoping-sensitive — export returns all identity data for one account. Enumeration §3.1 / §6 WP-4.
acceptanceCriteria: deletion and export read/write the canonical model (docs/canon/identity/data-model.md) — canon wins, S0–S6 design choices are NOT canonical — with ownership verified through the parent chain. A negative-path break test (cross-account export/deletion denied) is demonstrated red-before-green. Flag-gated; legacy intact until WP-FLAG. Unit + integration green.
